welcome.imageAlt: Three characters at a desk welcoming you to begin
welcome.lead: A character companion app that lives on your own device. Take a minute to set things up, and you're ready to go.

companion.title: Character companions
companion.desc: Each character has their own personality and working style — they can use your computer, write code, and get things done.

life.title: A virtual life
life.desc: Characters keep their own daily rhythm: what they're doing right now, their mood and energy all shift over time.

circle.title: Workflow collaboration
circle.desc: Characters understand task context, break down requirements, track progress, and summarize outcomes like capable work partners.

memory.title: Custom character cards
memory.desc: Swap or create cards freely: use a favorite character, a real persona, or your own original companion.

identity.title: Tell us about yourself
identity.lead: This lets characters know who they're talking to and how to address you. You can change it all later under "You".
identity.nameAria: My name or what to call me
identity.introLabel: About you (optional, shown to all characters)
identity.introPlaceholder: Things you'd like characters to know: who you are, what you're working on, your personality…

model.title: Connect a model provider
model.lead: Enter any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Base URL, model name, token) and your characters can start talking.
model.tokenPlaceholderSaved: Saved — leave blank to keep it
model.saved: Saved — you can continue to the next step.
model.error: Couldn't save. Please check and try again.

done.title: You're all set
done.leadConfigured: Your characters are ready — go say hello. Enjoy ✨
done.leadUnconfigured: You haven't set up a model yet, so characters can't reply for now — you can add one later in Settings. Enjoy ✨
